gateA_simple_work_open.description: Narrow FIT-backed gate for simple fixed-distance Work + Open workouts.
gateA_simple_work_open.decision: passes for narrow feature-flagged prototype only
gateA_simple_work_open.recommendedAction: Allow a debug or feature-flagged HKWorkoutActivity boundary prototype for simple Work + Open only, with fallback to current reconstruction when any required evidence is missing or incompatible.

gateB_custom_multi_step.description: Separate FIT-backed gate for custom multi-step workouts.

currentEvidence.blockedReason: row-level FIT label, timing, and distance extraction is not available yet for Gate B

gateB_custom_multi_step.decision: blocked pending separate structured and special-workout gates
gateB_custom_multi_step.recommendedAction: Keep structured intervals and warmup/work/cooldown specials out of the simple Work + Open prototype.

duplicate_no_plan_excluded.recommendedAction: Use as reference evidence only unless a workout is clearly matched to a planned fixture and reclassified.

fallbackRules: Use the current reconstruction when HKWorkoutActivity rows are missing.
Use the current reconstruction when activity count and WorkoutKit planned step count do not reconcile for the active gate.
Use the current reconstruction when candidate rows are missing required Work/Open rows for Gate A.
Use the current reconstruction when a workout is structured, special, no-plan, duplicate, or otherwise excluded from Gate A.
Never read FIT files at runtime and never require a HealthFit dependency in the app.
notProvenByFIT: FIT does not prove exact Apple Fitness UI presentation parity.
FIT does not prove private Apple smoothing or labeling rules.
FIT does not approve structured interval or warmup/work/cooldown promotion through Gate A.
FIT does not become a production data source.

recommendation.simpleWorkOpen: Proceed to a narrow feature-flagged HKWorkoutActivity prototype only.
recommendation.structuredIntervals: Blocked pending Gate B structured interval validation.
recommendation.warmupWorkCooldownSpecials: Blocked pending Gate B special-workout validation.
